kitchen-remodel in Atlanta, GA

Trusted local professionals serving Atlanta and surrounding communities

Serving Atlanta, GA

From Midtown high-rises to Virginia-Highland bungalows, we understand Atlanta's diverse kitchen needs. Our intown projects range from restoring original features in Druid Hills estates to creating space-saving solutions for Old Fourth Ward lofts. We navigate Atlanta's historic district regulations seamlessly while delivering modern functionality. City living presents unique challenges - we design for everything from narrow row house kitchens to expansive Buckhead estates. Many intown projects incorporate sound-dampening materials for condo living and compact appliances that don't sacrifice performance. For homes near the BeltLine, we create kitchens that transition effortlessly to outdoor entertaining spaces.

Atlanta's varied neighborhoods demand specialized approaches - from historic preservation in Grant Park to contemporary minimalism in West Midtown, all while addressing urban space constraints.
